interventions.name: R4 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: pipeline mapping routines that label each stage from input to interpreted output

interventions.name: R4 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: before-and-after comparison tasks connecting one upstream data choice to one downstream inference effect

interventions.name: R4 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: model-limit prompts requiring a statement about assumptions, missingness, or bounded uncertainty

interventions.name: R4 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: paired pipeline analyses that preserve one workflow pattern across a second dataset or context
